Further classification of Neretia thesioides may include the order Myrtales and the clade Rosidae.

intro: Neretia thesioides, also known as the Bitter Nettle or Stinging Nettle, is a plant species that belongs to the Celastraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects that may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Neretia thesioides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic potential.
